code:
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Product is defective, unsafe, or completely ineffective
    - Multiple unresolved issues with strong negative language ("terrible", "dangerous")
    - Updates showing unresolved problems negating initial satisfaction
    - Explicit warnings against purchasing

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but with major compromises affecting regular use
    - Significant quality issues or misleading descriptions
    - Short lifespan despite proper use ("broke immediately")
    - Partial functionality across product variants

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros and cons with explicit compromises
    - "Better than nothing" statements with limitations
    - Temporary solution for specific use cases
    - Conflicted tone without clear satisfaction

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Clear recommendations with acknowledged limitations
    - Material quality concerns despite good functionality
    - Requires special handling/maintenance for optimal use
    - Praise focuses on aesthetics with functional constraints
    - "Works well if..." conditional satisfaction
    - Comparisons to premium products with qualified recommendation

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Core functionality excellence outweighs minor issues
    - Long-term updates maintaining strong recommendation
    - Overcoming learning curves with exceptional results
    - Explicit preference over competitors despite noted flaws
    - Emotional enthusiasm overriding minor criticisms
    - Transformative impact stated without reservations

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - "Works best when..." optimizations →5 vs "Avoid..." constraints →4
    - Material thinness with functional success →4
    - Brand comparisons with preference →5
    - Resolved issues + full satisfaction →5
</DynamicRules>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "Dangerous vacuum spat debris everywhere. Completely useless."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Larger size broke immediately while medium worked. Unreliable."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "Adequate for basic storage but feels flimsy. Temporary solution."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "Vibrant color transforms rooms! Thin material compared to premium brands."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "Learning curve but makes perfect brew - worth every penny!"
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "Keeps coffee hot well but nothing revolutionary. Reliable."
Rating: 4

Example 7:
Review: "UPDATE: Still works perfectly after year of use despite quirks."
Rating: 5

Example 8:
Review: "Not quite Lodge quality but my daily driver. Highly recommend!"
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: "Great if you follow measurements precisely. Avoid overfilling."
Rating: 4

Example 10:
Review: "Thinner than expected but works great when handled gently."
Rating: 4

Example 11:
Review: "Revolutionized my kitchen despite weight. Can't live without!"
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

</System>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
artifacts_json:

  gold 3 -> 5: 1
  gold 1 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):

  2. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "We own a huge amount of Lodge cast iron cook and bake ware plus a few odd pieces collected over the years. Although I've tried other brands in the past, Lodge remained the best. Now, I'd like to say this was equal or better than Lodge but it's not......"
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "Between a puppy and frequent visits from children, I've definitely had times when it felt like the gap between proper carpet cleanings was entirely too long. On the other hand, I never entirely bought the idea that a device of this type could turn ou..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "This is a coffee pot for coffee geeks.  Most discerning coffee aficionados likely wouldn't notice much if any difference from a a great less complicated coffee make, such as a Bonavita.  To cut to the point, this probably isn't for you, but who knows..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "These mats are fine if you like to switch them out a lot. If you refer to have a very fresh and new bathmat for the bathroom when guests are staying for a visit, then these have a fun knobbly like texture to them and are cheap enough to pick up for s..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 24 errors, 9 borderline out of 54 examples."}
